findings.title: Hermes evidence packet references a CP00-141 manifest not present in this change set
findings.description: createAuditComplianceCp141HermesEvidencePacket lists "docs/closeout-packs/cp00-141/manifest.json" in evidence_refs, but no such manifest appears in the 6-file staged change set (diff stat) or in the repo status snapshot. Both the test (packages/audit/test/audit.test.js) and the validator (scripts/validate-rp03-audit-architecture.mjs) tolerate its absence via try/catch and fall back to the closeout plan, so this does not break the no-write, non-execution, sensitive-omission, plan-binding, or test gates. However, for an audit/compliance evidence pack the declared evidence reference currently dangles, slightly weakening the evidence chain. This is informational only and does not block production-ready.
findings.recommendation: Produce docs/closeout-packs/cp00-141/manifest.json as part of the CP00-141 closeout so the evidence_ref resolves, or remove the manifest entry from evidence_refs if this lane does not ship a per-pack manifest. Confirm the convention matches CP00-135..CP00-140.

adjudication_notes: Raw Claude review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with P0=0, P1=0, P2=1, P3=0.
Raw P2 manifest evidence-ref note is resolved by materializing docs/closeout-packs/cp00-141/manifest.json and validating it through npm run closeout-pack:validate CP00-141.
Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 counts are zero after adjudication.
coverage_notes: CP00-141 adds a no-write, synthetic-only UI permission/audit binding and fixture-opening catalog (packages/audit/src/ui-permission-fixture-binding-catalog.js) covering 40 units RP03.P04.M04.S18-RP03.P04.M06.S15 across micro-phases M04 (3 terminal evidence/handoff rows), M05 (22 permission/audit binding rows), and M06 (15 synthetic fixture opening rows). I verified the arithmetic independently: covered-unit order, first/last unit IDs, the deliverable distribution (ui 17, implementation 11, claude_review 4, security_audit 4, hermes_evidence 2, fixture 1, test 1) and evidence-mode counts (3/22/15) all reconcile to 40 and match the test assertions. All boundary flags (no-write/append/mutate, no permission/tenant/matter/audit-hint/audit-query/export/admin-review execution, no API/network, no render/DOM/browser/screenshot/interaction, no Claude/Hermes runtime, no LDIP, no HRX split) are declared, deep-frozen, and asserted in both the package tests and the architecture validator. Sensitive data is omitted: only a denylist of forbidden field NAMES is surfaced (no raw text, secrets, tenant/matter/permission/audit values, cross-tenant counts, or unauthorized object names), mirroring the contract's hidden_source_fields and consistent with prior packs. Contract is bumped to v0.8 with current_pack=CP00-141, next_pack=CP00-142, next_subphase=RP03.P04.M06.S16, and the validator was updated in lockstep. Handoff packet binds CP00-141 to CP00-142/RP03.P04.M06.S16 and H03/C03 stay evidence/read-only-review gates only; the Claude packet declares read_only=true and executes_review=false/sends_claude_prompt=false. Reported validations (node --check, 38 package tests, npm test 1112, rp03:audit:validate, closeout-pack-plan:validate, build/validate suites, diff --check) all pass. No P0/P1 issues; one non-blocking evidence-hardening note below.
Coverage validation returned covered_unit_count=40, first=RP03.P04.M04.S18, last=RP03.P04.M06.S15.
Catalog readiness rows=40; deliverable counts sum to 40; evidence modes bind terminal evidence, permission/audit binding, and synthetic fixture opening references.
H03 packet H03.CP00-141.audit_compliance_ui_permission_fixture_binding and C03 packet C03.CP00-141.audit_compliance_ui_permission_fixture_binding remain read-only reference evidence gates.
Closeout handoff points to undefined / RP03.P04.M06.S16.
